backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages customer leads (stored by email) with methods to submit, delete, retrieve, and list all leads sorted by name, plus blob storage mixin inclusion.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to the specific frontend files changed and component dependencies involved.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file's purpose and recent changes for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, accent, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA with the page title set to 'TRI-GITA SERVICES' and a root div that mounts main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order: Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, WhyChooseUs, WarrantyGuarantee, Services, BankFinanceBanner, WhatsAppSection, Footer, and FloatingWhatsAppButton.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Full-width promotional banner highlighting 90% bank loan availability for solar installation, with a WhatsApp CTA button linking to the company's WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Empty file — the Contact section component has been removed.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed bottom-right floating button with a WhatsApp icon and tooltip that opens the company's WhatsApp chat link in a new tab.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer showing brand info with operating hours and a contact details column (phone, email, address); the Quick Links navigation column has been removed.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header for TRI-GITA SERVICES with a logo, smooth-scroll nav links, a phone call link, a WhatsApp CTA button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a background solar image, headline, tagline, and CTA buttons linking to WhatsApp and the scheme section via smooth scroll.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Step-by-step guide section for applying to PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana in Odisha, covering registration, vendor selection, installation, and subsidy disbursement phases along with subsidy tiers, eligibility, documents, and DISCOM info.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Informational section about the PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana scheme, displaying key benefits, eligibility criteria, and a four-step process from consultation to subsidy receipt.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section presenting two solar installation offerings—domestic (1–10 kW) and commercial (10–500 kW+)—each with feature lists, an image card, and a CTA button linking to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Renders a warranty section with three cards displaying 25-year panel, 10-year inverter, and 5-year free service guarantees, each with an icon, badge, and description.
Displays a WhatsApp contact section with a styled card linking to a specific WhatsApp number, encouraging users to chat with solar experts.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a 'Why Choose Us' section with three benefit cards highlighting the company's registered vendor status, technical expertise, and hassle-free process.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitLead` mutation hook that submits lead form data to the ICP backend actor and invalidates the leads query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS including Tailwind imports, CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens, and utility classes for gradients, hero overlay, and section padding.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom fonts (Montserrat, Inter), and an extended color palette using OKLCH tokens including solar (warm amber/golden) and charcoal (deep slate) custom scales alongside standard UI color tokens.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for 'TRI-GITA SERVICES' solar energy website, recording completed features (footer cleanup, color scheme update, warranty section) and their corresponding requirement IDs at schema version 3.
